blocker: Reachability under the live RL policy unproven (static probe only); GPU/cluster ablation out of scope
one_line: Adversarial probe over 42 scenarios x 7 attacks (294 probes) found 5 working reward-hacks of rex/scoring.py deterministic judge: negation/single-token/wrong-component (100%), hedge (92.9%, composes to 0.55 reward), homoglyph (85.7%); 6 pinning tests pass, no core edits
